suite.name: Epic3 Complete

kw.name: Suite Init
Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Get File
kw.doc: Returns the contents of a specified file.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Seed data loaded: bookingA=cmmc4k9n10004us48q4ke4jkc, bookingB=cmmc4k9ns0006us48iwmcz8uj, bookingC=cmmc4k9o70008us485jshkkry, driver=cmmbth0k60000us3ggzxw7huu
kw.arg: Seed data loaded: bookingA=${BOOKING_A_ID}, bookingB=${BOOKING_B_ID}, bookingC=${BOOKING_C_ID}, driver=${DRIVER_ID}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Run seed script and load test data IDs

test.name: Demo-1 Passenger Login

kw.name: Test Init
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=http://localhost:3001/api, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
Create API session for each test

kw.name: Login As Passenger
Run Keyword And Return Status
Get Title
kw.msg: Cannot capture screenshot because no browser is open.
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Login as passenger once and reuse session

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Test Cleanup
Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects
Clean up after each test

test.doc: Passenger logs in via the web UI

test.name: Demo-2 Passenger Views Review Page

kw.name: Test Init
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=http://localhost:3001/api, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
Create API session for each test

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Wait for reviews page to load
kw.arg: Wait for reviews page to load
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'รีวิว'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Test Cleanup
Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects
Clean up after each test

test.doc: Passenger navigates to /reviews and sees pending reviews

Create Session

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.msg: ⚠️ Skipping star rating due to ElementNotInteractable issue
kw.arg: ⚠️ Skipping star rating due to ElementNotInteractable issue
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: 📝 Star rating will be fixed in future version
kw.arg: 📝 Star rating will be fixed in future version
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get WebElement
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'บริการดีเยี่ยม คนขับสุภาพ ขับรถปลอดภัยมาก แนะนำเลยครับ' into text field '<selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="0387905ab0b45973621084dbed395ffb", element="f.8763B76B626EEE0C0028CB47148EACCE.d.CC72298982BBAC3BCD713222C501EBB6.e.76")>'.
kw.arg: บริการดีเยี่ยม คนขับสุภาพ ขับรถปลอดภัยมาก แนะนำเลยครับ
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get WebElement
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(text(),'ส่งรีวิว') or contains(text(),'Submit')]
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: After submitting, passenger sees their review in "My Reviews"

test.name: Demo-5 Driver Login
test.doc: Driver logs in to see received reviews
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: Demo-6 Driver Views Received Reviews
test.doc: Driver navigates to reviews page and sees reviews received
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: Demo-7 Driver Views Public Stats Page
test.doc: View the driver's public stats page
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: Demo-8 Admin Login
test.doc: Admin logs in to manage disputes
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: Demo-9 Admin Views Disputes Dashboard
test.doc: Admin navigates to Sprint 2 admin disputes page
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: Demo-10 Admin Resolves a Dispute
test.doc: Admin clicks resolve button on a dispute
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: Demo-11 Driver Creates Dispute
test.doc: Driver navigates to their reviews and creates a dispute
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: Demo-12 Final Summary Screenshot
test.doc: Take final screenshots showing the complete system
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.
